metadata.name: New Module
metadata.author: Unknown
metadata.description: The land sleeps under an enchantment. Gather the awakening crystals from the dungeons and bring them to the shrine in Driftshire to break the spell.

towns.name: Driftshire
towns.description: A hillside town whose cobbled streets wind between stone cottages.

key_dungeons.name: Forsaken Mines
key_dungeons.description: A rusted iron gate bars the path into Forsaken Mines. It swings open with a tortured groan at your touch.
key_dungeons.quest_objective: Explore Forsaken Mines and recover the lost Amethyst Key
key_dungeons.quest_hint: The artifact was hidden here long ago by a forgotten order.
